item.name: Merlthor Butterfly
item.description:
Highly sought by aquarium owners for its vivid coloration, this increasingly rare species is arguably worth its weight in gold.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: Sought after for display in aquariums, demand soared to perilous heights when word spread that Gegeruju would pay handsomely for a Merlthor butterfly. Hearing this, fishers all but threw themselves into the Strait of Merlthor, driving this fish to the brink of extinction. In the end, he would have his prize, but at a far greater cost than he realized.
